# Notes from the previous strategy fixture:
# 1. BitMEX futures sells XBTUSD with a limit head 6 USD above the current BTC reference and a buy stop tail 20 USD above the fill/reference.
# 2. Kraken Futures sells ADA after the BitMEX head fills, with a limit head 20 bps above the current ADA reference and a buy stop tail 10 bps above the fill/reference.
# 3. Binance spot buys ADA after the Kraken tail closes, then emits a post-only zero-distance limit tail intended to cancel immediately.
# Before running, probe the Kraken ADA demo symbol and replace PI_ADAUSD if the venue reports a different tradeable ADA instrument.
